differences: The compact brush bar is denser than the earlier floating panel, but remains fully in bounds at the native minimum width.
The guide tint is intentionally subtle so the underlying raw/effect blend stays judgeable while painting.
reasoning: The final mask editor reads as a polished image-effect tool: the 42px control bar preserves nearly the full composition, slider fills and values agree, the circular cursor communicates feathering, and the 6 percent guide tint remains visible without obscuring the artwork. Alignment, hierarchy, contrast, and responsive containment all pass visual QA.
